confirm_restore_new_exists_msg: A folder named '{x}' already exists! The content of this folder CAN BE DELETED and the backup will be extracted there. Do you confirm?
confirm_restore_new_msg: The backup will be extracted into a new folder named '{x}'. Continue?
confirm_truncate_table_msg: All data in "{x}" table will be cleared (TRUNCATE). This action cannot be undone. Are you sure?
confirm_truncate_tables: Data of {x} selected table(s) will be completely cleared (TRUNCATE). Are you sure?
conn_failed_err: Connection failed. (System detected MySQL service is closed)
operation_taking_too_long: The operation is taking longer than expected.
apache_guide_desc: Follow these steps to download and install a compatible Apache version:
apache_guide_step1: Go to the Apache Lounge download page.
apache_guide_step3: Select the downloaded .zip file using the Service Version Install button in the app.
apache_guide_step4: The app will automatically install it to the correct folder.
php_guide_desc: Follow these steps to download and install a compatible PHP version:
php_guide_step1: Go to the official PHP Windows download page.
php_guide_step2: Make sure to download the Thread Safe x64 version (.zip) for Apache compatibility.
php_guide_step3: Select the downloaded .zip file using the Manual Install button on this page.
php_guide_step4: The app will automatically place the files and configure the settings.
mysql_guide_desc: Follow these steps to download and install a compatible MySQL version:
mysql_guide_step1: Go to the official MySQL Community download page.
mysql_guide_step2: Always download the **ZIP Archive** version (not the installer).
mysql_guide_step3: Select the downloaded .zip file using the Manual Install button on this page.
mysql_guide_step4: The app will automatically create database folders and configure the settings.
cron_desc: Define commands to be run automatically at specific intervals.
cron_every_month: First day of every month at 00:00
cron_fields_required: Name, schedule and command fields are required.
cron_node_desc: Run a script located in your TouchAMP root or project folder.
cron_php_desc: Execute PHP files directly using the built-in PHP binary.
cron_url_desc: Useful for triggering PHP cron jobs on remote servers or local sites.
